utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Now check which of these are fully specified in the final property solution. (1) property: fully specified with type, location, price, and detailed features — included. (2) financing: fully specified (cash purchase, source, and loan_required) — included. (3) legal_services: fully specified (provider, services_included, cost, currency) — included. (4) moving_services: fully specified (provider, services_included, special_handling, cost, currency) — included. (5) setup_services: present and somewhat specified (utilities_included, additional_needs) — included. (6) total_budget: fully specified with all cost breakdowns — included. Although there is an extra 'property_survey' field, that does not affect coverage of the required items. Therefore all 6 required items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution includes several components: a 2-bedroom accessible condo purchase in Burlington, Ontario priced at CAD 695,000; financing via cash purchase; legal services from 'Basic Legal Package0'; a property survey from 'Basic Legal Package1'; and moving services from 'Premium Moving9'. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, we match each item to the closest corresponding option in the ground-truth dataset. The 2-bedroom accessible condo aligns most closely with the 'Luxury Condo' in the ideal real estate profile, which has a rating of 10 as it matches the accessibility, single-floor, and lifestyle requirements within budget. The financing 'cash purchase' corresponds to 'Cash Purchase' under purchase_financing with a rating of 10. The 'Basic Legal Package0' and 'Basic Legal Package1' both correspond to 'Basic Legal Package' under essential_legal_services with a rating of 8, and 'Basic Survey' under property_surveys_inspections with a rating of 8. The moving service 'Premium Moving9' corresponds to 'Premium Moving' under moving_services with a rating of 10.
